arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich youngster Tarek Buchmann making progress; Only Hiroki Itō and Daniel Peretz absent from team training; and MORE!
arts.sum: Training ahead of the trip to Rotterdam pic.twitter.com/OobGCXTnmI Only Hiroki Itō and Daniel Peretz missed the team training session before the squad left for Amsterdam (via @iMiaSanMia ):

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich eyeing Villarreal winger Alex Baena?; FC Barcelona’s “dream signing” is hard to get Bayern star; Barca also wants RB Leipzig’s Benjamin Šeško; Bayern has competition for Ousmane Diomande; and MORE!
arts.sum: FC Barcelona reportedly has Jamal Musiala as its “dream signing” — but it does not appear that Bayern Munich is going to let anything get that far: At 23-year-old, the Spaniard could potentially be a new option on the wing for Bayern Munich, but it remains to be seen just how committed the club might be to rebooting the position.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany ready for Bayern Munich to experience the atmosphere at Feyenoord
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany lives for Champions League nights and will surely have his boys ready for their outing in Amsterdam against Feyenoord. “We have a lot of experience in the team and I believe that the atmosphere is motivating for us,” Kompany said (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala respects Feyenoord, won’t get caught looking past them
arts.sum: But we are looking forward to the game,” said Musiala (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ). Bayern Munich star Jamal Musiala understands his team’s tenuous position in the Champions League table.

arts.ttl: “Performance principle” sidelines Aleksandar Pavlović at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Vincent Kompany does not take into account names and transfer plans when deciding the lineup, hence Leon Goretzka, even though he’s still a candidate for sale, has been starting regularly recently. Amid Leon Goretzka’s sudden resurgence at Bayern Munich is the relegation of youngster Aleksandar Pavlović — at least from a clear first choice in the XI alongside Joshua Kimmich to a more rotational player.

arts.ttl: Feyenoord amped up and ready for Bayern Munich showdown in Champions League
arts.sum: Feyenoord manager Brian Priske is rallying his troops to be ready for battle and bring tenacity to the pitch when Bayern Munich visits on Wednesday for a Champions League tilt. Tomorrow is a great chance for that,” said Giménez (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: Ex-Bayern Munich player Lothar Matthäus: Borussia Dortmund should hire Joachim Löw
arts.sum: “If Jogi Löw were standing on the sidelines – it was similar back then with Franz Beckenbauer at Bayern,” Matthäus began (as captured by Sky Sports Germany journos Kerry Hau and Florian Plettenberg | @Plettigoal ). Bayern Munich is in the midst of a number of important contract situation, so let’s talk about them on the Bavarian Podcast Works Show!

arts.ttl: Feyenoord remain in race to sign Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano, Feyenoord are still showing concrete interest in Chelsea youngster Cesare Casadei. The 22-year-old is free to leave Stamford Bridge this month as long as Chelsea’s requirements…

arts.ttl: Opinion: Tom Bischof is as close to the perfect midfield signing as can be for Bayern Munich
arts.sum: On one hand, signing a talented young German midfielder on a “free” transfer (sign-on fees notwithstanding) seems like a brilliant piece of business, but on the other hand there is a suspicion that this is all there is to the signing. Everything Bischof does on the ball facilitates smooth and quick possession play, which helps disrupt the opposition’s press and allows his team to keep the ball.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Cesare Casadei subject of 'fresh formal bid' from new Serie A club, amid reports of Torino interest
arts.sum: Lazio are reportedly in the process of submitting a formal bid for Chelsea midfielder Cesare Casadei, amid interest from Torino and an unnamed Premier League club.
